text: Each Occurrence, 1 = $100,000,000. General Aggregate, 1 = $100,000,000. Products-Completed Operations Aggregate, 1 = $100,000,000. Products-Completed Operations Extension, 1 = 12 years (or. the applicable statute of repose or statute of limitations, whichever is less)., 1 = the applicable statute of repose or statute of limitations, whichever is less).
